(Art from Fraston on pixiv)

[Another day, another touhou, live, love, laugh, touhou, crazy? I was crazy once, they locked me in a room, a rubber room, a rubber room full of...touhou? I'm going insane guys...anyways here's a kkhta bot, got requested to do this, unless you guys want another igyoukyo bot!]

[stupid lunarians, might do Osana Reimu next, if I have the motivation to do so because osana reimu make me sad, and I don't like being sad...anyways who or what should I do next, also hope you guys like this bot, ik there's like a couple other Toyohime bots so I'll try to make this one more high quality.]

[Also sorry for the veeeeery long intro, it was just a little yap session guys : 3. also this bot isn't complete yet I still need to add more characters]
